corrections: tools/research_smoke.py: the synthetic Parquet round trip now writes the FULL versioned observation contract for both quote and bar (all 14 required common fields, all five point-in-time timestamps observation/source/received/ingestion/availability, raw_object_id + raw_object_sha256, quality_flags as a DuckDB VARCHAR[] list, and the populated quote size / bar volume variant fields) using DuckDB-native types; nullable fields round-trip as NULL. After readback the harness asserts the expected column set, reconstructs each record, re-runs the local validator on every reconstructed record, and compares every field (with deterministic numeric normalisation) plus the raw lineage and all five timestamps against the source records; count and aggregate checks retained.

tools/research_smoke.py: replaced the single combined manifest (which mislabelled event quotes as interval M1) with SEPARATE quote_manifest and bar_manifest, distinct deterministic dataset IDs (synthetic_eurusd_quotes / synthetic_eurusd_bars), record_type quote|bar, interval event|M1, each referencing only its own raw objects, single content checksum and row/partition counts.

research/contracts/market_observation_v1.schema.json: kept root additionalProperties:false and tightened the variant allOf so record_type=quote forbids all bar-only fields (frequency/open/high/low/close/volume/volume_unit set to false) and record_type=bar forbids all quote-only fields (bid/ask/bid_size/ask_size set to false), while still requiring the variant's own fields.

tools/research_smoke.py local validator: now rejects unknown fields and cross-variant fields (bar-only on quote, quote-only on bar), enforces strict common-field types (instrument_id/source_id non-empty strings; broker_id/account_type string-or-null; quality_flags list of strings; numeric bid/ask/OHLC excluding bool) instead of relying on accidental Python comparison errors, and preserves the existing UTC, raw-lineage, bid<=ask, high>=low and availability>=observation checks.

research/contracts/dataset_manifest_v1.schema.json: added required record_type (enum quote|bar), source_objects minItems:1, content_checksums minProperties:1, and constrained config_hash to the lowercase SHA-256 pattern via the existing sha256_hex definition; retained the logical/non-personal artefact_location and all prior required fields.

tests/test_research_foundation.py: added tests for full-field Parquet round trip and column set, readback re-validation + field-for-field match + null round-trip + quality_flags list, separate quote/event and bar/M1 manifests (dataset IDs, record_type, interval, owned source objects, owned checksum, counts), schema cross-variant rejection structure, and the tightened dataset-manifest constraints; unknown-field and both cross-variant validator rejections; non-string quality flag rejection.

research/README.md and docs/DATA_CONTRACTS.md (Current schema-foundation section only): describe the full-field contract round trip and separate quote/event + bar/M1 manifest semantics; Candidate/Proposed/Unknown boundaries preserved.
docs/NOTION_MAP.md: appended titles GFX-EVD-005B (PM review), GFX-PKT-005B-R1, GuvFX — Current State v0.15 (titles only).
packets/ACTIVE.md: active pointer set to GFX-PKT-005B-R1.
commands: stdlib scope/privacy check: only authorised files changed; no real-data artefact/personal path/credential; Parquet column sets include every required contract field; manifests separate and unambiguous
